## Release vX.Y.Z

### Summary

<!-- What changed in this release -->

### Deploy

After publishing this release, deploy to GitHub Pages:

1. Open **Actions** → **Deploy to GitHub Pages**
2. Click **Run workflow**
3. Set **git_ref** to this tag (e.g. `vX.Y.Z`)
4. Set **release_tag** to `vX.Y.Z`
5. Type `deploy` in **confirm**
6. Run workflow

Live site: https://bilalmuhammad41.github.io/mbilal-portfolio/
